summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Croatian quiz application with liquid glass design. Backend APIs working correctly with 92.9% success rate. Frontend fully functional with Croatian language interface, quiz flow, timer, admin panel, and leaderboard.

minor_issues.issue: Rate limiting triggered during testing (expected behavior)

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint with Croatian response
Croatian categories retrieval (Matematika, Hrvatski jezik, etc.)
Quiz session start and answer submission
Landing page with liquid glass design and Croatian text
Multiple question types (true/false, single choice, multiple choice)
Admin panel access and Croatian interface
